requiredCatalogChecks: SELECT count(*) = 40 FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname = ANY(ARRAY['identity','journal','performance','discipline','reminder','market','market_data_public','price_alert','rotation','stock_research','partner','content','operations']) AND c.relkind IN ('r','p','v','m')

SELECT count(*) = 10 FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=c.relnamespace WHERE c.relkind='i' AND c.relname = ANY(ARRAY['api_keys_user_idx','diaries_user_date_idx','diary_alerts_due_idx','journal_outbox_unpublished_idx','market_daily_bars_published_idx','price_alert_active_idx','refresh_tokens_family_idx','rotation_snapshots_lookup_idx','stock_timeline_user_stock_event_idx','transactions_diary_idx'])
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_proc p JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=p.pronamespace WHERE n.nspname='stock_research' AND p.proname='reject_timeline_mutation')

SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_trigger t JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid=t.tgrelid JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=c.relnamespace WHERE n.nspname='stock_research' AND c.relname='stock_timeline_records' AND t.tgname='stock_timeline_immutable' AND NOT t.tgisinternal)
